# Wetland Property Services

> Locally owned junk removal and cleanout company in Port St. Lucie, Florida, serving the Treasure Coast (St. Lucie, Martin, and Indian River counties). Residential and commercial (B2B). Licensed & insured. Load-based upfront pricing.

Phone: (561) 371-7073
Book a free quote (photo upload): https://nexfieldpro.com/book.html
Hours: Mon–Sat, 8am–6pm
Pricing: single items from $99; truck loads from $149 (quarter load) to $479 (full load). Price includes labor, hauling, and disposal.

## Services
- [Garage Cleanouts](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/garage-cleanouts): Reclaim your parking spot. Years of buildup cleared in one visit — you point, we haul.
- [Yard & Patio Cleanouts](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/yard-patio-cleanouts): Old patio furniture, grills, planters, green waste, and debris — cleared and swept.
- [Estate Cleanouts](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/estate-cleanouts): Respectful, full-property clearing on your schedule. Room by room, left broom-clean.
- [Office Cleanouts](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/office-cleanouts): Desks, cubicles, filing cabinets, and e-waste. After-hours and weekend scheduling available.
- [Storage Unit Cleanouts](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/storage-unit-cleanouts): Stop paying rent on stuff you don't want. We empty the unit so you can close it out.
- [Storm Recovery](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/storm-recovery): Fallen limbs, fence sections, water-damaged furniture — fast turnaround after Treasure Coast storms.
- [Single-Item Pickup](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/single-item-pickup): One couch, one fridge, one treadmill — starting at $99, usually gone the same week.
- [Curbside & Trash Pickup](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/curbside-trash-pickup): Bag it or stack it at the curb and we take it from there. Easy add-on to any job.
- [Commercial & B2B](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/commercial): property managers, realtors, offices, storage facilities, contractors. Volume pricing, after-hours scheduling, COI on request.

## Service Area
- [Port St. Lucie, FL](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/junk-removal-port-st-lucie)
- [Fort Pierce, FL](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/junk-removal-fort-pierce)
- [Stuart, FL](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/junk-removal-stuart)
- [Jensen Beach, FL](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/junk-removal-jensen-beach)
- [Palm City, FL](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/junk-removal-palm-city)
- [St. Lucie West, FL](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/junk-removal-st-lucie-west)
- [Tradition, FL](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/junk-removal-tradition)
- [Hobe Sound, FL](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/junk-removal-hobe-sound)
- [Vero Beach, FL](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/junk-removal-vero-beach)
- [Hutchinson Island, FL](https://wetlandpropertyservices.com/junk-removal-hutchinson-island)

## What we take
Furniture, mattresses, appliances, electronics/TVs, exercise equipment, pianos, pool tables, hot tubs and small sheds (light demolition), construction debris, carpet, scrap metal, yard debris, general trash. We cannot accept hazardous materials (wet paint, chemicals, fuel, asbestos).
